summary: Live-applied ADR 0280 from the latest rebased origin/main lineage by converging the private Changedetection.io runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, refreshing the authenticated /v1/changedetection API gateway route, repairing the Mattermost and guest-side PostgreSQL dependencies uncovered during replay, and verifying that the repo-managed watch catalogue is now drift-free on the live server.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest tests/test_changedetection_sync.py tests/test_changedetection_runtime_role.py tests/test_changedetection_metadata.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py -q` returned `41 passed in 1.59s` after the live replay fixes were folded back into the worktree.
`make syntax-check-changedetection`, `make syntax-check-mattermost`, and `make syntax-check-netbox` all passed on the repaired worktree.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces health-probes`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, and `git diff --check` all passed after the workstream ownership manifest was updated to cover the real live-debug surfaces.

`make converge-changedetection` succeeded with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=311 changed=118 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=33 rescued=0 ignored=0`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0280-converge-changedetection-r8.txt`.

verification.check: Current host and Changedetection runtime state
verification.observed: The current host probe confirmed `debian-base-template`, `pve-manager/9.1.6/71482d1833ded40a (running kernel: 6.17.13-2-pve)`, and `sudo qm status 120 => status: running`; the settled guest probe confirmed the `changedetection` container is `healthy`, the root page responds, `systeminfo.watch_count == 9`, `tag_count == 4`, and `/opt/changedetection/watch-sync-report.json` reports `changed=false` with zero pending actions.

An authenticated `curl -fsS -H "Authorization: Bearer $LV3_TOKEN" https://api.example.com/v1/changedetection/` returned the private Changedetection UI HTML for version `0.54.7`, confirming the API gateway route is refreshing the live runtime.

notes: This receipt records branch-local live-apply proof on top of repo version 0.177.96 and platform version 0.130.63 before the exact-main integration step.

The initial replay failed because Mattermost was crash-looping on an invalid retention combination and because guest-side PostgreSQL clients were still pointing at a host-only address; those dependency fixes are now part of the committed worktree.

The initial Changedetection reconcile also left false-positive watch drift because the sync script compared live API-defaulted fields against sparse desired payloads; the repaired normalization now verifies only declared fields and the live sync report is clean.
Protected release surfaces and ADR 0280's final repo/platform implementation metadata remain to be updated only during the exact-main merge and live replay on the newest origin/main.

correction_loop.repair_action: Reworked Changedetection watch reconciliation to compare only declared payload fields, split notification route decoding from URL assembly, rendered the watch catalogue through a dedicated template, and repaired Mattermost plus guest-side PostgreSQL defaults that blocked the live notification path.
correction_loop.verification: Reran the focused pytest slice and syntax checks, replayed Mattermost successfully, reran the governed Changedetection converge successfully, and confirmed the settled sync report now returns changed=false with zero actions.
